_comment: Suite-owned config — separate from any CLI tool's own config. Run deep-council with --reconfigure to update.
_ttl_note: TTL check uses (current_time - updated) > ttl_hours in real time. Committed past timestamps self-expire on next run and trigger re-discovery.
_model_validation: Model identifiers must be confirmed valid at runtime. Bridge availability checks will warn (not SKIP) if a model identifier cannot be resolved by the provider.

gemini._model_note: Set to null to use Gemini's default model. To pin a version, verify identifier with: gemini --version or Gemini API docs.

codex._model_note: Set to null to use Codex server default. To pin a version, verify with: codex models list

opencode._model_note: Models must use provider/model format. Verify each identifier is valid for your OpenCode provider config before committing.
